setup: 1 ordinary Lv 4.0 Infantry attacker Colonel Mueller with Infantry Hero vacant versus 1 FC1 Lv 1.0 Infantry defender Alpaca with Gatot.

turn_inference.cadence: King's Bestowal triggers each time Gatot's Infantry attacks
assumptions: For these controlled Gatot Infantry tests, Martin treats King's Bestowal's trigger count as the exact battle-round count.

attacker.name: Colonel Mueller
attacker.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T4, no Fire Crystal

composition.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T4, no Fire Crystal

stats_capture.notes: All three troop classes and all four stat rows are visible in the report Stat Bonuses panel. Mueller attacker troop is ordinary/no-FC Infantry at the tier shown on the troop icon.
All three troop classes and all four stat rows are visible in the report Stat Bonuses panel. Alpaca's right-side Infantry is FC1 T1, not normal T1.

hero_skills.name: Golden Guard
hero_skills.effect: Gatot commands his troops with imperial guard tactics, increasing his Infantry's Defense by 6%.

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: The great kings blesses Gatot's Infantry, granting Infantry a Shield with protection equal to Attack*6% each time they attack, for 1 turn.

notes: Source location: WOS_BattleReports_Gatotv5.pdf, PDF page 1, report 2 on page.
Actual source file was found at E:/WOS/Screeenshots/WOS_BattleReports_Gatotv5.pdf.
Left/red side attacker is Colonel Mueller at X:745 Y:473.
Right/blue side defender is Alpaca at X:747 Y:475.
Colonel Mueller fields 1 ordinary Lv 4.0 Infantry; the attacker troop is not Fire Crystal.
Alpaca's right-side Infantry is FC1 T1 Rookie Infantry, not normal T1 Infantry.
FC1 T1 Infantry base stats from WOS_Troop_Stats_FC1-FC10_T1-T10.json are Attack 1, Defense 4, Lethality 1, Health 6.
Battle overview shows Colonel Mueller/left side has 1 injured troop and 0 survivors; Alpaca/right side has 1 survivor and no injured troop.
Gatot Golden Guard triggered 1 time; King's Bestowal triggered 332 times; visible third Gatot skill triggered 1 time.
Skill kills are displayed as dashes and recorded as zero for Gatot skill rows.
Gatot is on Alpaca/right-side defender Infantry; attacker Infantry Hero slot is vacant.
This v5 PDF includes a visible T2 Infantry report even though the requested ladder note mentioned T3-T10.

manual_overrides: Mueller attacker troop tier was identified from the visible Infantry troop icon and cross-checked against the one-injured-unit power loss.
Alpaca's defender Infantry manually tagged as FC1 T1 per visible FC1 badge and prior Martin instruction for this Alpaca/Gatot set.
Gatot hero card level is not recorded because the tiny card text is not reliably transcribed in this PDF render.
Gatot skill names/descriptions use Martin's previously supplied fixed Gatot reference.

checks: attacker troops 1 = injured 1 + survivors 0 + losses 0 + lightly injured 0
defender troops 1 = injured 0 + survivors 1 + losses 0 + lightly injured 0
defender kills 1 matches attacker injured count in this controlled 1v1 report convention
attacker power loss -9 matches one ordinary T4 Infantry injured using tier power 9
Alpaca defender troop is tagged FC1 T1 in every file
missing: Gatot hero card level not reliably transcribed

_stat_base_reference: STAT BASE REFERENCE: Alpaca deploys Fire-Crystal (FC) Infantry. Use the FC-adjusted base troop stats in docs/TroopStats/WOS_Troop_Stats_FC1-FC10_T1-T10.json, NOT a normal-T1 assumption. For Infantry T1 at FC1, Attack=1, Defense=4, Lethality=1, Health=6. Mueller attacker Infantry is ordinary/no-FC and uses wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS for the visible tier.
